versions.version_description: Fixed missing chord highlight that was missing and cleaned up headers.
This version uses a capo on the 4th fret in order to play the hook similarly to the original.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Here are three ways to play the song:

1.

[tab][ch]D#m[/ch]                  [ch]C#[/ch]
Windmill, Windmill for the land.[/tab]
[tab] [ch]G#m[/ch]          [ch]A#m[/ch]
Turn forever hand in hand[/tab]
[tab][ch]D#m[/ch]             [ch]C#[/ch]
Take it all in on your stride[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]              [ch]A#m[/ch]
It is sticking, falling down[/tab]
[tab][ch]D#m[/ch]           [ch]C#[/ch]
Love forever love is free[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G#m[/ch]            [ch]A#m[/ch]
Let's turn forever you and me[/tab]
[tab][ch]D#m[/ch]                  [ch]C#[/ch]
windmill, windmill for the land[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G#m[/ch]        [ch]C#[/ch]
Is everybody in?[/tab]


2.

CAPO 1ST FRET

[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]
Windmill, Windmill for the land.[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Gm[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch]
Turn forever hand in hand[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]
Take it all in on your stride[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]               [ch]Am[/ch]
It is sticking, falling down[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]
Love forever love is free[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Gm[/ch]             [ch]Am[/ch]
Let's turn forever you and me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]
windmill, windmill for the land[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Gm[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
Is everybody in?[/tab]


3.

TUNE HALF STEP DOWN

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]
Windmill, Windmill for the land.[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]Bm[/ch]
Turn forever hand in hand[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]
Take it all in on your stride[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]Bm[/ch]
It is sticking, falling down[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]
Love forever love is free[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]Bm[/ch]
Let's turn forever you and me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]
windmill, windmill for the land[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
Is everybody in?[/tab]

____________________________________________

Actually, that's it. Play those chords through the whole song, or until you get bored.

Y
